raw_consumer_statement:
My Mastercard from Citibank was charged {$1300.00} on XX/XX/year> by a merchant I have never heard of or done business with. On XX/XX/year>, I notified Citibank of the error. 
I have called them numerous times and gotten nothing but denials and non-answers to my requests for credit. 
I called the merchant who charged my card on XX/XX/year>. They said the charge could not be theirs as they do not accept credit cards! They also told me that a number of people have called them saying they had the same problem I do! 
I called the credit card company with this information. They said I should send an email with this information to their Security Service Manager which i did on XX/XX/year>. Citibank is still denying me a credit! 
Help me please. This is a sizable amount of fraud by someone and Citibank is not honoring their commitment to protect me from fraud. 
Thank you
